steps.title: Use the prism formula
steps.content: A rectangular prism has three pairs of congruent faces. For dimensions $5$, $6$, and $7$, use the surface area formula.

steps.title: Compute the three face areas
steps.content:
Find the area of one face from each pair.
$$5(6)=30$$
$$5(7)=35$$
$$6(7)=42$$

steps.title: Double the sum
steps.content:
Double the sum of those three face areas.
$$2(30+35+42)=2(107)=214$$
The answer is D.
